query: SELECT id, codigo, fotoAntesUrl, CASE WHEN fotoAntesBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_BASE64' ELSE 'NO_BASE64' END as has_base64, CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_MARCADA' ELSE 'NO_MARCADA' END as has_marcada FROM items ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT id, codigo, fotoAntesUrl, CASE WHEN fotoAntesBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_BASE64' ELSE 'NO_BASE64' END as has_base64, CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaBase64 IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_MARCADA' ELSE 'NO_MARCADA' END as has_marcada FROM items ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
